Rythmos® Motion Light Switch

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Motion Detection
Occupancy Tracking
Vacancy Monitoring
Light Control

Overview

Rythmos® Motion Light Switch is a passive infrared (PIR) motion sensor designed for occupancy and vacancy-based lighting control. Featuring integrated Rythmos Mesh Network connectivity, it delivers reliable motion-triggered load control in a compact wall-switch form factor.

FUNCTIONS

Provides motion-triggered lighting control
Supports occupancy and vacancy sensor modes
Relays wireless signals across the mesh network
Allows for adjustable time delays

Key Capabilities

Fall
Prevention

Lighting
reduces nighttime fall risk

Hands-Free
Operation

No
need to use manual switches

Energy
Efficiency

Lights
off in empty rooms

Mesh
Support

Extends
Rythmos network coverage

Certified
Reliability

UL
listed for healthcare environments

Easy
Installation

Fits
standard wall boxes for fast deployment

Hardware Specifications

Dimensions: 105 x 44.47 x 25 mm
Input Power: 120-277V AC, 50/60Hz
Max Output LED/Electronic Ballast: 300W at 120V / 600W at 277V
Max Output Tungsten/Incandescent: 600W at 120V / 1200W at 277V
Max Output Motor: 1/2 hp at 120V
Detection Angle: 180 degrees
Detection Range: Up to 30ft (9m)
Mounting Height: Up to 4ft
Operating Temperature: 32-104 F (0-40 C)
Mesh Network Protocol: Rythmos Mesh Network Wirepas 2.4 GHz based
Mesh Network Range: 100ft (30m) typical
Suitable For: Indoors only
Warranty: 5 years
Firmware Updates: Over-the-air OTA

COLORS

White
Ivory
Light Almond

Installation Guidelines

Mounting

Installs in a standard single-gang wall box at a height of up to 4ft

Setup

Ensure the Fresnel lens remains unobstructed for optimal detection

Wiring Guide

• Black Wire: Connect to Hot/Live
• White Wire: Connect to Neutral
• Bare Wire: Connect to Ground
• Red Wire: Connect to Load

Reset

Hold the button for 5 seconds to reset the device settings

Colors

Available in White, Ivory, and Light Almond

intrexis.com
